properties.avoid: Stimulants, 2C-X compounds, CNS depressants, Tramadol, DXM, MXE.
properties.effects: Stimulation, Dehydration, Hypertension, Tachychardia, Increased alertness, Euphoria, Bruxism, Loss of Inhibition, Increase in energy
properties.summary: A cathinone based stimulant. Hexen (aka Ethyl-Hexedrone) acts as an NDRI to produce it's effects, and as with most cathinones, it has a fast onset and short duration. This drug has very little history of human consumption and little to no clinical research. Further research and caution is advised.
